race.description: Latrobe Regional Hospital Pink Day BM56 Hcp
race.comment: Wide open. BOOKMAN (7) has really put it together over the last couple of runs including a dominant win last time. Drops a few kilos for this and is fit and in form. Looks hard to hold out again. SARA'S ROCKET (11) is fitter for three runs back and has placed two of three this campaign. Runner-up in similar grade last time and can go one better. TEDDY BOY (3) is an interesting runner who resumes at the mile. Saves best form for this circuit and will relish the conditions. Has been trialling well and a bold showing is expected fresh.  GOLDEN HIPS (2) resumes from a long spell. Has won fresh and form good at this circuit, including a win only try course and distance. Fitter for three trials and should run well.
